name: Sauteed Salmon Steaks.
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Spread an even layer of mustard on the surface of each fish steak.
3. Add the apple cider vinegar to the melted butter and mix well.
4. Place the fish steaks in the skillet, making sure they are not overcrowded.
5. Cook the steaks for 10 minutes on one side, then flip them over and cook for an additional 10 minutes on the other side.
6. For variations: You can substitute beer for apple cider vinegar. Any large fish steak will work well with this recipe.
Recipe date: 11/28/87
